features.evidence: the a34 isn t too far off from last year s model either in practice the a34 has enough power for casual gaming and the phone runs smoothly enough with no issues when it comes to day to day tasks the 5 000 milliamp hour battery capacity is back from last year and the battery life on the a34 is excellent with an overall endurance rating of 133 hours this support for 25 watt charging here and the charger doesn t come in the box with an official samsung adapter we were able to charge from 0 to 51 in half an hour now we have the cameras the setup is pretty much the same as on the a33 5g with a 48 megapixel main cam and 8 megapixel ultra wide and a 5 megapixel macro cam but there s no depth sensor here photos from the main cam come out at 12 megapixels due to pixel binning they re good for the class with saturated colors good contrast and reasonable dynamic range they re not terribly sharp when you look up close though despite the lack of a dedicated depth sensor portrait shots from the main camera are decent they have good subject separation and the colors and textures on the subject are nice 8 megapixel photos from the ultrawide cam have good detail saturated colors and boosted contrast a decent showing close ups from the macro cam are all right they have enough detail high contrast and popping colors in low light the a34 s main cam does a good job capturing plenty of detail and nice colors the dynamic range is decent with some detail and shadows and pretty well contained light sources there is a night mode to use beyond that as well it s pretty speedy to capture a photo but doesn t have a huge benefit mostly just cleaning up the noise but at the same time shadows seem to be a bit darker in this mode the ultrawide camera struggles quite a bit in low light the photos are soft and noisy night mode doesn t do much for the ultra wide camera either which is a bit of a bummer selfies from the 13 megapixel front facing cam are very good with plenty of detail and nice skin tones the contrast is high and the dynamic range is balanced videos can be captured with the main cam and up to 4k resolution at 30fps these clips look nice with a lot of detail and wide dynamic range colors are punchy and the contrast is dialed in a bit high too the ultra wide cam is limited to 1080p resolution its videos are alright with a decent level of detail but limited dynamic range the colors and contrast seem a bit over the top here there is electronic stabilization available for all of the cameras but only in 1080p resolution it does its job pretty well and in low light 4k video from the main cam is just okay the detail level is good but these videos are dark with plenty of noise and narrowed dynamic range so that s the samsung galaxy a34 it s a really solid mid ranger for the price with a large 120 hertz amoled great battery life and a solid enough chipset the cameras do a pretty decent job too while the difference from last year s model is in night and day there are enough changes here for the a34 to make sense and as a well rounded mid ranger is definitely worth recommending thanks for watching guys if you re on the lookout for alternatives to the galaxy a34 you might start off with xiaomi s redmi note 12 pro or you could consider the google pixel 6a let us know what you guys think and i ll see you on the next one

oh yeah this is one of samsung s new a series mid rangers the galaxy a34 last year s model was rather popular so does the a34 bring an improvement on the tried and true formula i m will for gsmarena and let s find out in our full review the a34 is pretty similar to the a33 5g which came before it but there are some important differences this year the display on the a34 is not only bigger but it s wider with a faster refresh rate there s also a new chipset a mediatek one this time around since the screen is a bit bigger the phone is overall a bit larger too it s made of plastic with a glossy finish on the back panel the curved matte frame is plastic as well and the rest of samsung s phones this year each camera gets its own separate little bump here and as you d expect from an a series phone these days you get ip67 ingress protection against water and dust the display of the a34 is a 6

oh yeah this is one of samsung s new a series mid rangers the galaxy a34 last year s model was rather popular so does the a34 bring an improvement on the tried and true formula i m will for gsmarena and let s find out in our full review the a34 is pretty similar to the a33 5g which came before it but there are some important differences this year the display on the a34 is not only bigger but it s wider with a faster refresh rate there s also a new chipset a mediatek one this time around since the screen is a bit bigger the phone is overall a bit larger too it s made of plastic with a glossy finish on the back panel the curved matte frame is plastic as well and the rest of samsung s phones this year each camera gets its own separate little bump here and as you d expect from an a series phone these days you get ip67 ingress protection against water and dust the display of the a34 is a 6 However, but with the a34, not only did samsung give this phone everything the a54 has, but they also made the mistake of trying to opt for a less powerful processor as a way to bring this phone down a notch, but ended up taking an embarrassing misstep that further cements their longstanding problems with their own in house hardware

it s a decent mid range chipset built on an efficient 6 nanometer process in benchmarks the galaxy a34 holds its own its scores aren t so far off from the more expensive galaxy a54 with his exynos 1380

5x9 aspect ratio which we feels a little bit more comfy to use than the 20x9 on last year s model samsung made an improvement this year when it comes to max brightness we measured a maximum of 480 nits with a manual slider and this boosts over a thousand nits in auto mode when in bright sun and i mentioned the 120 hertz is an upgrade over the previous model s 90 hertz and it s that much smoother when swiping around it won t dial down to save energy when idling though the display looks great overall sharp and contrasty it does very well with color accuracy too there is no hdr support here though for audio the galaxy a34 has a pair of stereo speakers they have good loudness and the sound quality is also good mids could be better but highs are great and there s even some bass you can wake up and unlock the phone with an under display optical fingerprint reader and the a34 comes with 128 or 256 gigs of storage on board and that is expandable through microsd the interface of the galaxy a34 is samsung s latest one ui 5 However, you d probably think i was crazy or that something wasn t quite right

review_summary: the a34 isn t too far off from last year s model either in practice the a34 has enough power for casual gaming and the phone runs smoothly enough with no issues when it comes to day to day tasks the 5 000 milliamp hour battery capacity is back from last year and the battery life on the a34 is excellent with an overall endurance rating of 133 hours this support for 25 watt charging here and the charger doesn t come in the box with an official samsung adapter we were able to charge from 0 to 51 in half an hour now we have the cameras the setup is pretty much the same as on the a33 5g with a 48 megapixel main cam and 8 megapixel ultra wide and a 5 megapixel macro cam but there s no depth sensor here photos from the main cam come out at 12 megapixels due to pixel binning they re good for the class with saturated colors good contrast and reasonable dynamic range they re not terribly sharp when you look up close though despite the lack of a dedicated depth sensor portrait shots from the main camera are decent they have good subject separation and the colors and textures on the subject are nice 8 megapixel photos from the ultrawide cam have good detail saturated colors and boosted contrast a decent showing close ups from the macro cam are all right they have enough detail high contrast and popping colors in low light the a34 s main cam does a good job capturing plenty of detail and nice colors the dynamic range is decent with some detail and shadows and pretty well contained light sources there is a night mode to use beyond that as well it s pretty speedy to capture a photo but doesn t have a huge benefit mostly just cleaning up the noise but at the same time shadows seem to be a bit darker in this mode the ultrawide camera struggles quite a bit in low light the photos are soft and noisy night mode doesn t do much for the ultra wide camera either which is a bit of a bummer selfies from the 13 megapixel front facing cam are very good with plenty of detail and nice skin tones the contrast is high and the dynamic range is balanced videos can be captured with the main cam and up to 4k resolution at 30fps these clips look nice with a lot of detail and wide dynamic range colors are punchy and the contrast is dialed in a bit high too the ultra wide cam is limited to 1080p resolution its videos are alright with a decent level of detail but limited dynamic range the colors and contrast seem a bit over the top here there is electronic stabilization available for all of the cameras but only in 1080p resolution it does its job pretty well and in low light 4k video from the main cam is just okay the detail level is good but these videos are dark with plenty of noise and narrowed dynamic range so that s the samsung galaxy a34 it s a really solid mid ranger for the price with a large 120 hertz amoled great battery life and a solid enough chipset the cameras do a pretty decent job too while the difference from last year s model is in night and day there are enough changes here for the a34 to make sense and as a well rounded mid ranger is definitely worth recommending thanks for watching guys if you re on the lookout for
